final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior scene illustration of a French romantic bedroom (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "法式浪漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 19th-century French Impressionist interior painting tradition, Wes Anderson's pastel-drenched set design sensibility, 1920s Parisian boudoir photography heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a four-poster bed with sheer canopy draping, a vintage vanity dresser, and scattered rose petals
Scene/backdrop: must include a 巴黎 street view visible through the window
Lighting/mood: needs a soft morning light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a romantic, warm-soft direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a delicate, gauzy surface treatment (sheer fabric, aged wood, soft linen) — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
